copy_prompts.zh: 请按 https://sula.1stp.monster/launch/ 的启动协议接管当前项目。
copy_prompts.en: Please take over the current project using the launch contract at https://sula.1stp.monster/launch/.

startup_rule: Do not search npm packages, global commands, or guessed local aliases when the project does not already vendor Sula.
Read launch_url and this descriptor first, then resolve the canonical launcher or source from the declared URLs.
If local scripts/sula.py is missing, use vendored-project first, then explicit-local-source, and finally clone source_repository_url at source_ref.
Treat source_repository_url plus source_ref as the canonical public source for first-time bootstrap.
already_adopted_behavior: If .sula/project.toml already exists, classify the repository as an existing Sula consumer.
Report existing-consumer state explicitly instead of narrating a fresh adoption.
Prefer doctor --strict and sync --dry-run before proposing first-time adopt writes.
new_project_behavior: Prefer onboard as the first-touch flow for projects that are not yet adopted.
Ask only the minimum missing questions.
Explain what Sula will manage, where files will route, and which source was used.

launcher.public_source_requirement: Use vendored-project or explicit-local-source when they exist; otherwise clone the published canonical public source.

entrypoints.url_launch_prompt_zh: 请按 https://sula.1stp.monster/launch/ 的启动协议接管当前项目。
entrypoints.url_launch_prompt_en: Please take over the current project using the launch contract at https://sula.1stp.monster/launch/.
